results.title: NVIDIA (NVDA) 21-Day Outlook: Earnings Anticipation Battles Overbought Technicals
Prediction: Nvidia Stock Will Skyrocket After May 20
NVIDIA (NVDA) Stock Forecast: Analyst Ratings, Predictions & Price Target 2026

summary_extracted: NVDA Q1 FY2027 earnings call set for May 20, 2026 (after market). Management guiding ~77% revenue growth; analysts project 79%. Forward P/E ~18.97 with $96.68B FCF — discount to Magnificent Seven peers. RSI above 80 flagged as overbought. Strong Buy consensus, avg target $266.24 (+33% upside). Volatile amid AI spending scrutiny ahead of earnings.
